name: ElevenLabs
description: Convert text to ultra-realistic speech, clone voices, and manage audio projects with ElevenLabs — the leading AI voice platform.

auth.hint: Find your API key in ElevenLabs → Profile Settings → API Key.

tools.name: text_to_speech
tools.description: Convert text to speech using a specific ElevenLabs voice. Returns audio data.

params.name: voice_id
params.description: Voice ID from list_voices, e.g. 21m00Tcm4TlvDq8ikWAM for Rachel

params.name: text
params.description: Text to synthesize (max 5000 characters per request)

tools.name: list_voices
tools.description: List all available ElevenLabs voices including cloned and pre-made voices.

tools.name: get_models
tools.description: List all TTS models available on ElevenLabs with their languages and features.
